case_title: PENG, LINDA et al VS CHEN, JEFF DBA JEFF'S WELDING

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY PENG, LINDA PENG, CHEN-HWA AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, JEFF DBA JEFF'S WELDING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-30-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PLTFF'S DECLARATION:REQUEST FOR 8/30 HEAR.DATE.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, JEFF DBA JEFF'S WELDING

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-26-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-17-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 COURT TO PROVIDE MANDARIN INTERPRETER.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PENG, LINDA PENG, CHEN-HWA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHEN, JEFF DBA JEFF'S WELDING $1,750.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,800.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

VIA-FED EX CORRESPONDENCE FILED BY PLTF.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-17-2007 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED SENT TO PENG, LINDA.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-30-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-26-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 CONT. TO 9/26/07 AT 8:30 P.M. SO THAT DEFENDANT CAN BRING A MANDARIN INTERPRETER, AND DEFENDANT TO BRING IDENTIFICATION AND EVIDENCE. DEFENDANT MUST ARRANGE TO BRING HIS OWN INTERPRETER.
